description.zh: 面板管理工作台 · 工作台启用/排序 + 多模态模型绑定 + cli-provider 认证健康 + marketplace 插件计数 4 个 section,与 SettingsPanel sections registry 保持同源。
description.en: Admin workbench. Four sections — workbench enable/order, multi-modal model bindings, cli-provider auth health, marketplace plugin counts — kept in sync with the SettingsPanel sections registry.
